name: canshare-who-pancreas-site-histology
title: NZ WHO pancreas site histology
description: Histologies used for pancreatic neoplasms (from WHO Classification of Tumours, Digestive Tumours, latest edition, including sections 10. Tumours of the pancreas, 11. Haematolymphoid tumours of the digestive system, 12. Mesenchymal tumours of the digestive system) or an 'Other' value.
